name: context-handoff
description: Prepare near-full agent thread handoffs and start fresh continuation sessions, with Codex automation and cross-agent adapters.

interface.shortDescription: Hand off near-full Codex threads to fresh sessions.
interface.longDescription: Context Handoff packages a portable handoff skill, Codex compact-time hooks, and cross-agent adapters that preserve work when an agent thread approaches the context limit. It drafts a complete handoff and starts a fresh continuation thread when thread tools are available.
defaultPrompt: Use $context-handoff to move this near-full thread into a fresh session.
